name: Sex restaurant \\ Multiple
description:
FEMPOV: You are a woman who had been searching for a job, but no one seemed willing to hire you. Everything changed when you came across a peculiar restaurant. To your surprise, they agreed to hire you, but under an unconventional role: being the "free-use toy" for both customers and staff. The pay was surprisingly generous, even more than you needed. However, by signing the contract, you agreed to strictly abide by all its conditions.
